suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit verification-only / baseline-repair path so workers are not forced into TDD-red and agent-browser steps when a feature only changes tests or validates already-green branch state.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All five misc-followup-baseline feature reviews recorded justified deviations from the current designer-tracking-worker procedure. Sessions `337275ae-b219-498a-bed0-b066b3043c46`, `419e83eb-fb46-433d-9a2f-f62710f199f6`, `00706867-0ad6-41da-b8ed-c57f9652f44d`, `78c1b324-8f69-4660-aef1-42139fc07984`, and `11306958-7df1-42c5-ba53-188447b90bbb` all describe baseline-only or verification-only work where browser verification was not meaningful.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Correct stale verification paths in feature definitions so reviewers and workers are pointed at the actual component/test locations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `fix-followup-baseline-annotation-and-style` found `features.json` verification steps still reference `src/components/review/AnnotationPanel.test.ts`, while the real files live under `src/components/tools/`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the scoped tool-store v5 persistence contract in shared library notes.
rejectedObservations.reason: better handled by orchestrator or a dedicated knowledge-maintenance task; not applied during scrutiny because this run should avoid opportunistic documentation edits
